<function=python>

# Let me check all node colors to find container walls
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c not in color_groups:
        color_groups[c] = []
    color_groups[c].append(n)

    print(f"Color {c}: {len(group)} nodes")
    for n in group:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
